testcase.name: test_add_item_to_shopping_list_saves_full_details
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:72: in test_add_item_to_shopping_list_saves_full_details assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Session expired"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_shopping_list_returns_grouped_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:98: in test_get_shopping_list_returns_grouped_structure assert add_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_chore_requires_title

testcase.name: test_create_chore_requires_list_items

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty list_item_ids, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:389: in test_create_chore_requires_list_items assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for empty list_item_ids, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty list_item_ids, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_item_requires_child_id_and_item_id

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing child_id, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:400: in test_add_item_requires_child_id_and_item_id assert response1.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing child_id, got {response1.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing child_id, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_item_validates_store_item_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for nonexistent item, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:424: in test_add_item_validates_store_item_exists assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for nonexistent item, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for nonexistent item, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_child_cannot_access_parent_shopping_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 for child access, got 401 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py:451: in test_child_cannot_access_parent_shopping_list assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for child access, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for child access, got 401 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
